'''鈭歞h-g-dh''' ('''dhagadha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:woodchop|woodchop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-g-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:woodchop|woodchop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-g-dh
|-
! Lemma
| dhagadha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhagadhithi|dhagadhithi]] || [[word:dhagadhiji|dhagadhiji]] || [[word:dhagadhishi|dhagadhishi]] || [[word:dhagadhi|dhagadhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhagadhuthuth|dhagadhuthuth]] || [[word:dhagadhujuj|dhagadhujuj]] || [[word:dhagadhushush|dhagadhushush]] || [[word:dhagadh|dhagadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhagadhuthu|dhagadhuthu]] || [[word:dhagadhuju|dhagadhuju]] || [[word:dhagadhushu|dhagadhushu]] || [[word:dhagadhu|dhagadhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhagadhufuth|dhagadhufuth]] || [[word:dhagadhufuj|dhagadhufuj]] || [[word:dhagadhufush|dhagadhufush]] || [[word:dhagadhuf|dhagadhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhagadhethe|dhagadhethe]] || [[word:dhagadheje|dhagadheje]] || [[word:dhagadheshe|dhagadheshe]] || [[word:dhagadhe|dhagadhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhagadhothoth|dhagadhothoth]] || [[word:dhagadhojoj|dhagadhojoj]] || [[word:dhagadhoshosh|dhagadhoshosh]] || [[word:dhagadh|dhagadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhagadhotho|dhagadhotho]] || [[word:dhagadhojo|dhagadhojo]] || [[word:dhagadhosho|dhagadhosho]] || [[word:dhagadho|dhagadho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhagadhofoth|dhagadhofoth]] || [[word:dhagadhofoj|dhagadhofoj]] || [[word:dhagadhofosh|dhagadhofosh]] || [[word:dhagadhof|dhagadhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhagadh忙th忙|dhagadh忙th忙]] || [[word:dhagadh忙j忙|dhagadh忙j忙]] || [[word:dhagadh忙sh忙|dhagadh忙sh忙]] || [[word:dhagadh忙|dhagadh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhagadhathath|dhagadhathath]] || [[word:dhagadhajaj|dhagadhajaj]] || [[word:dhagadhashash|dhagadhashash]] || [[word:dhagadh|dhagadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhagadhatha|dhagadhatha]] || [[word:dhagadhaja|dhagadhaja]] || [[word:dhagadhasha|dhagadhasha]] || [[word:dhagadha|dhagadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhagadhafath|dhagadhafath]] || [[word:dhagadhafaj|dhagadhafaj]] || [[word:dhagadhafash|dhagadhafash]] || [[word:dhagadhaf|dhagadhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhagadhasha|dhagadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhagadhasha|godhagadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhagadhasha|gokidhagadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhagadhn眉sha|dhagadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhagadhnkn眉sha|godhagadhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhagadhn眉sha|gokidhagadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhagadhsh毛sha|dhagadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhagadhnksh毛sha|godhagadhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhagadhsh毛sha|gokidhagadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhagadhrosha|dhagadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhagadhnkrosha|godhagadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhagadhrosha|gokidhagadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhagadhmusha|dhagadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhagadhnkmusha|godhagadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhagadhmusha|gokidhagadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhagadhsherasha|dhagadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhagadhnksherasha|godhagadhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhagadhsherasha|gokidhagadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhagadhngasha|dhagadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhagadhnkngasha|godhagadhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhagadhngasha|gokidhagadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhagadhyasha|dhagadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhagadhnkyasha|godhagadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhagadhyasha|gokidhagadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhagadhyamasha|dhagadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhagadhnkyamasha|godhagadhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhagadhyamasha|gokidhagadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhagadhn眉sh毛sha|dhagadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhagadhnkn眉sh毛sha|godhagadhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhagadhn眉sh毛sha|gokidhagadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhagadhn眉rosha|dhagadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhagadhnkn眉rosha|godhagadhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhagadhn眉rosha|gokidhagadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhagadhn眉musha|dhagadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhagadhnkn眉musha|godhagadhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhagadhn眉musha|gokidhagadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhagadhsh毛n眉sha|dhagadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhagadhnksh毛n眉sha|godhagadhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhagadhsh毛n眉sha|gokidhagadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhagadhsh毛rosha|dhagadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhagadhnksh毛rosha|godhagadhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhagadhsh毛rosha|gokidhagadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhagadhsh毛musha|dhagadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhagadhnksh毛musha|godhagadhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhagadhsh毛musha|gokidhagadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhagadhron眉sha|dhagadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhagadhnkron眉sha|godhagadhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhagadhron眉sha|gokidhagadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhagadhrosh毛sha|dhagadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhagadhnkrosh毛sha|godhagadhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhagadhrosh毛sha|gokidhagadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhagadhromusha|dhagadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhagadhnkromusha|godhagadhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhagadhromusha|gokidhagadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhagadhmun眉sha|dhagadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhagadhnkmun眉sha|godhagadhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhagadhmun眉sha|gokidhagadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhagadhmush毛sha|dhagadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhagadhnkmush毛sha|godhagadhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhagadhmush毛sha|gokidhagadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhagadhmurosha|dhagadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhagadhnkmurosha|godhagadhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhagadhmurosha|gokidhagadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhagadh|dhagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dh忙g忙dh|dh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhagadh|hodhagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodh忙g忙dh|hodh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhagadh|hohodhagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodh忙g忙dh|hohodh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dhagadh|n眉dhagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉dh忙g忙dh|n眉dh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dhagadh|n眉n眉dhagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dh忙g忙dh|n眉n眉dh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dhagadh|n茂dhagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂dh忙g忙dh|n茂dh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dhagadh|n茂n茂dhagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dh忙g忙dh|n茂n茂dh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhagadh|ludhagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludh忙g忙dh|ludh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhagadh|luludhagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludh忙g忙dh|luludh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhagadh|lidhagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidh忙g忙dh|lidh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhagadh|lilidhagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidh忙g忙dh|lilidh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhagadh|kodhagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodh忙g忙dh|kodh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhagadh|kokodhagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodh忙g忙dh|kokodh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhagadh|kedhagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedh忙g忙dh|kedh忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhagadh|kekedhagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedh忙g忙dh|kekedh忙g忙dh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
